title: GitHub node invalid format error with filesystem mode
symptom: When using the GitHub node to save files with N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE set to filesystem, an 'invalid format (base64)' error occurs. Removing the variable resolves the issue.
not_this_if: N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE is not set to filesystem
Error does not occur when using smaller files
root_cause: When the N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE is set to filesystem, the GitHub node expects file contents to be in base64 format. If the contents are not converted, it leads to an invalid format error.
fix_steps: Add a conversion step to encode the file contents to base64 before passing them to the GitHub node.
Ensure that the GitHub node is configured to accept base64 encoded data.
agent_instruction: Convert the file contents to base64 before using them in the GitHub node.
